rationale: In the citing paper, the 2013 Goodman and Irmak article is present in the reference list but is not given an explicit, distinct role in the theory, hypotheses, measures, or result interpretation in the visible in-text discussion. The paper's conceptual development around feature-related evaluations is tied to other works that are directly discussed (e.g., Meyer et al. 2008; Thompson et al. 2005; Bertini et al. 2009). With no observable functional use of this specific citation, it is best classified as a background/pass-through mention.
